director.name: 安东尼·霍普金斯 Anthony Hopkins

introduction: Towards the end of his life, poet Dylan Thomas toured America, giving readings and speaking to audiences across the country. In this acclaimed dramatization directed by Academy-Award winning actor Anthony Hopkins, the beauty of Thomas's words and his larger-than-life presence are revealed through the spellbinding performance of Bob Kingdom. Featuring excerpts from Thomas's stories and letters, and recitations of the poems "My Thirtieth Year to Heaven," "And Death Shall Have no Dominion," and "Do Not Go Gentle into that Goodnight," DYLAN THOMAS: RETURN JOURNEY is an enthralling tour de force that captures the genius and passionate spirit of a great poet.
